title: Section 37
content: (1) There shall be constituted a fund to be called the Warehousing Development and Regulatory Authority Fund and there shall be credited thereto-- (a) all Central Government grants, fees and charges received by the Authority; (b) all sums received by the Authority from such other source as may be decided upon by the Central Government; (c) all sums realised by way of penalties under this Act. (2) The fund shall be applied for meeting-- (a) the salaries, allowances and other remuneration of the members, officers and other employees of the Authority; (b) the other expenses of the Authority in connection with the discharge of its functions and for the purposes of this Act.
